overview: A modern real estate platform MVP for buyers, renters, and sellers. Find trusted properties, compare options, and contact agents with minimal friction — search, filter, view, save, compare, and book visits all in one place.
features: Property search with filters (location, price, type, beds, baths, amenities)
Map and list view toggle on search results
Property detail pages with image gallery, amenities, and sticky contact CTA
Save, shortlist, compare, and share properties
Login/signup and user accounts via Internet Identity
Agent listing submission with photo uploads
Admin panel: approve listings, manage users, moderate content
Verification badges with freshness dates on listings
SEO landing pages for cities, neighborhoods, and property types
Blog and market guide content pages
